mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_RESERVATION_CONFIRM SET UPDATE_TIME = sysdate, CONFIRM_END_TIME = sysdate, STATUS = '2' WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT T2.ID, T2.CARGO_NAME, T2.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, T2.TON, T2.QUANTITY, T2.CARGO_INFO_ID, T3.CARGO_INFO_NO || '/' || T4.PLAN_NO AS CARGO_INFO_NO FROM T_BUS_TRUST T1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO T2 ON T1.ID = T2.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO T3 ON T2.CARGO_INFO_ID = T3.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TT2.CARGO_INFO_ID, LISTAGG(TT2.BUSINESS_NO, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TT2.BUSINESS_NO) AS PLAN_NO FROM T_BUS_TRUST TT1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TT2 ON TT1.ID = TT2.TRUST_ID WHERE ( TT1.TYPE = '集港' OR TT1.TYPE = '卸船' ) GROUP BY TT2.CARGO_INFO_ID ) T4 ON T3.ID = T4.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipVoyageItemId} AND ( T1.TYPE = '卸船' OR T1.TYPE = '装船' )
